description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular form. The exterior features a combination of white and gray walls, accented by sections of reddish-brown paneling and large glass windows, especially prominent on the front facade. The property includes a small swimming pool in the backyard, a covered patio area, and a detached carport with a slatted roof. The landscaping is simple, with a green lawn surrounding the structure and a concrete walkway leading to the main entrance. The rear and side elevations are more solid, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and gray walls, large front windows, a backyard pool, and a detached carport. The design features clean lines and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a covered patio, large open area, and a swimming pool set into the lawn.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the solid white wall with minimal windows and a vertical reddish-brown accent panel.
description_view_2: The front view displays the main entrance, large glass windows, reddish-brown paneling, and a concrete walkway.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals a detached carport with a slatted roof and a mostly solid white wall with a small accent panel.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and minimal side windows
